$AMD 463 is where momentum diverged. They will go back at some point.   Bollinger Bands on the daily. This is the 20 day period with +/- 2 standard deviations. The 20 day is used because there's approximately 20 trading days a month. Bollinger Bands expand with greater price movement and contract with sideways moves. The maroon lines are the Keltner Bands/Channels, which are like Bollinger Bands but move a more uniform distance from the regression line. A peel away from the upper or lower Bollinger Band means we watch for a return to the middle Bollinger Band which is the regression line. Green banded line is the 50SMA, magenta banded line the 200SMA. The middle chart is the DMI. When the blue line is above the gold, it's bullish. When the gold is above the blue, it's bearish. The labels quantify the strength.
